regressions.reasoning: stage_02 explicitly upgrades this same cluster from RabbitMQ 3.9 to 4.1 in-place, which restarts/rolls the pods and can change TLS certs, service reachability, and node identities used by the management API; the stale stage_01 oracle re-check against the now-upgraded cluster is expected to fail and doesn't reflect the agent breaking stage_01's original outcome.
